title: Assistance to Nationals as the Third Pillar of Philippine Foreign Policy
content: Assistance to nationals is the third pillar of Philippine foreign policy. Pursuant to the Philippine Foreign Service Act of 1991 and the Migrant Workers and Overseas Filipinos Act, as amended, the DFA is mandated to formulate and implement policies and programs to promote and protect the rights and welfare of Filipino migrants, and provide consular and legal assistance to overseas Filipinos in distress.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
